key_improvements.title: Phase 0 Empirical Validation
key_improvements.description: Run Phase 0 experiments demonstrating that LLM behavior admits tractable finite-state abstraction. Show ≥3-4 model × property combinations with ≤200 states and ≥0.90 prediction accuracy.
deliverables: Comprehensive Phase 0 experiment runner with realistic stochastic mock LLMs (phase0_experiments.py)

key_improvements.title: Close Lean-to-Implementation Gap
key_improvements.description: Since full Lean 4 formalization is infeasible at current scope, we (a) honestly scope verification claims in the paper, and (b) add property-based testing and differential testing to bridge the gap between mathematical claims and implementation.
deliverables: 38 property-based tests (up from 24) covering PCL* convergence, CoalCEGAR correctness, differential testing
Honest Lean 4 scoping in paper §9 (Future Work) and §8.5 (Limitations)
Paper explicitly states 'We do not claim formal verification of the core theory'
Appendix A with proof sketches for Theorem 1, Equation 1, Proposition 1

key_improvements.title: Classifier Robustness Analysis
key_improvements.description: Add robustness analysis for behavioral atom classifiers, showing how systematic classifier errors affect overall PAC guarantees. Include sensitivity analysis and error propagation bounds.
deliverables: Monte Carlo simulation: 2,000 trials per error rate, 6 error rates
Theoretical error bounds: ε_total ≤ ε_learn/(1-ρ) + ε_mc + ρ
Equation 1 in paper with proof in Appendix A.2
